items.label: Recipe: **Spicy Curry** — Purchase from Dorothee (Courageous 2F Book Room)
Recipe: **Mixed Grill** — Speak to Josef at Arseid Mansion (Legram)
**Gambler Jack Reprint #13** — Fortnum Books, Christie's Galleria 2F (Bareahard)
**Gambler Jack Reprint #14** — Fortnum Books, Christie's Galleria 2F (Bareahard)
**Gambler Jack II - Chapter 13** — Speak to Spare at Aurochs Fort (Rest Area - Crescent Moon)
**Black Records #5** — Lohengrin Castle SW corner (2nd Playthrough only)
Quest: **Father's Pocket Watch** — Jackass' Repair Shop, Roer (Alisa required)

blocks.heading: New Character Profiles (December 27)
rows: Speak to Dorothee at Courageous 2F (Book Room)
Speak to Klein at Courageous 3F (Weapon Shop)
Speak to Munk at Courageous 3F (Resting Area)
Part of Hearts in Harmony quest line
Speak at Roer House #1 (2F SE) during Hearts in Harmony

blocks.heading: December 27: Courageous Exploration
blocks.content: When you regain control, explore the ship to update profiles. On the **3rd Floor**, speak to **Munk** and **Klein** to update their profiles, then talk to **Jusis** for a short event. On the **2nd Floor**, speak to **Dorothee** to update her profile and purchase the **Spicy Curry** recipe. Find **Kenneth** in the cafeteria, then talk to **Emma** or **Celine** for another event. On the **1st Floor**, speak to **Paula** and play the **Blade** mini-game to raise Link EXP. Finally, head to the Bridge, speak to **Towa**, and set destination to **Ymir**.

checkpoints.label: Updated profiles (Munk, Klein, Dorothee, Kenneth, Paula)
Purchased Spicy Curry recipe from Dorothee

blocks.heading: Nightmare Tips: Battle Preparation
blocks.content:
At the end of this Act, you fight two consecutive battles with different teams (including guest characters). Prepare accordingly:

**Weapons:** Craft 10 weapons for Class VII (Sara does not participate in the final battles).
**Quartz:** Assemble Attack Stacks (Attack 3) for high STR members: Rean, Laura, Gaius, Millium.
**Accessories:** Obtain 4 Warrior/Gladiator Badge accessories. Build a **Canceler Set** for Rean and a **Dodge Set** for Fie.
**ARCUS:** Ensure Rean, Laura, Fie, and Emma each have two Level 2 slots (one elemental, one non-elemental).

**Sepith & Levels:** Target 90,000+ Mira and ample Fire/Time Sepith. Convert excess Water/Earth Sepith (batches of 1000) to Mira. Fight every enemy in the 3 remaining shrines and complete all Trial Chests for grinding. **Target Level: 107-109** for fighters/tanks.

blocks.heading: Ymir: Beryl & Snowboarding
blocks.content:
In Ymir, complete the new **Snowboard** course to earn the **Passionate Rouge** accessory. For a critical recruitment: **manually enter Ymir Valley** (Quick Travel won't trigger the event). Walk all the way to the very end to find **Beryl**—speak to her to recruit her.

Back on the Courageous, speak to Beryl in the **Fortune Room** (2F, SE room) to check your relationship status and bonding trophy eligibility.

**Alisa Note:** If Alisa is active in boss fights, she permanently gains the **True Gladiator Belt** and links to Rean (switching to Fie if needed for other fights).

checkpoints.label: Recruited Beryl (walk to end of Ymir Valley manually)

blocks.heading: Legram: Josef & Side Quests
blocks.content: Travel to **Legram**. Head to the **Arseid Mansion** (northwest) and speak to **Josef** to learn the **Mixed Grill** recipe. Visit the **Bracer Guild** and speak to **Klaus** or **Miles** to start the available side quest.

checkpoints.label: Learned Mixed Grill recipe from Josef

blocks.name: Mist Opportunity
blocks.content:
**Emma** must be in your party. Travel to **Lohengrin Castle**.

**Treasures:** **Chakravarti Gem** (Entrance Hall, east side), **EP Charge IV** (opposite side of gem), **Dark Emblem** (Left Wing).

**Boss: Lucifuge** (HP 156,170)
- *Mechanic:* Summons Shadow Spirits. Defeat spirits to force the boss to waste turns re-summoning instead of attacking.
- *Soul Pinon:* Incapacitates a party member and drains their HP. Use an **S-Craft** to release them instantly.
- *Strategy:* Use S-Crafts to clear spirits quickly, then focus damage on Lucifuge.

*2nd Playthrough:* Find **Black Records #5** in the bottom-left corner of the castle.

blocks.heading: Bareahard: Recruitment & Shopping
blocks.content:
Travel to **Bareahard**. At **Fortnum Books** (Christie's Galleria 2F), purchase **Gambler Jack Reprint #13** and **#14**. In the **Noble District** (House #2), speak to **Bridget** and call out **Alan** to recruit Bridget.

At **Sorciere Restaurant** (upstairs), speak to **Caroline** and accept her request—**Alisa** must be in your party. Go to Station Street, then the entrance of the Underground Waterway. Speak to **Theresia** and bring **Emily** to recruit her. This unlocks **Shooting Range Lv 4-5** (clear all 5 levels for the **Cypher** Master Quartz).

At **Turner's Jewelers** (Artisans' Street), speak to **Colette**. She asks you to find 4 **Dryad's Tear** on **South Kreuzen Highway** (marked with green exclamation points). Return them to recruit Colette.

**North Kreuzen Highway 2** is now accessible with a new fishing spot and a **Trial Chest** (Alisa/Elliot/Laura/Jusis). Bosses: King Falena x2 & Were Falena x4. Equip **Sleep resistant** accessory on Elliot (mobs use gas attacks). Use S-Crafts or Alisa's *Heavenly Gift* for the fight.

checkpoints.label: Cleared Shooting Range Lv 5 (Cypher Master Quartz)

blocks.heading: Aurochs Canyon & Fort
blocks.content:
Travel to **Aurochs Canyon** via Aurochs Fort. There's a fishing spot near the entrance. Collect treasures throughout: **Sepith**, **Celestial Balm EX**, **Qilin** quartz, **Impede 2** quartz, and **Shadow Blade**. In **Canyon 2**, find a **Trial Chest** for Machias/Jusis. The side quest monster is in Canyon 3 (see below).

At **Aurochs Fort**, speak to **Rex** and bring **Fidelio** to recruit him. In the **Rest Area - Crescent Moon**, speak to **Spare** to receive **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 13**.

checkpoints.label: Obtained Gambler Jack II - Chapter 13 from Spare

blocks.name: Canyon, or CAN'Tyon?
blocks.content:
Head to the **southeast corner** of Aurochs Canyon 3.

**Boss: Volkeron** (HP 146,640)
- **Formation:** Place Fie on top as bait.
- **Quartz:** Equip Freeze/Freeze II or Sleep on all members. Emma with strongest Water art.
- **Accessories:** Burn protection for all. Fie with Task equipment (AGI boost).
- **Links:** Pair Alisa and Fie.
- **Strategy:** Delay the boss constantly with Fie's *Bullet Cyclone* or Rean's *Arc Slash*. Focus damage with Water Arts. Freeze and Sleep are highly effective—keep the boss locked down.

blocks.name: Hearts in Harmony
blocks.content:
**Elliot** must be in your party. Recruit music-proficient NPCs:
- **Instructor Mary** — Roer House #1 (2F SE)
- **Fiona** — Garrelia Proving Ground (Store area)
- **Andre** — Bareahard Central Plaza (Street Musician)
- **Hibelle & Bridget** — Must already be recruited (no need to speak to them again)

Return to **Celdic Chapel** and speak to **Rosine** to complete.
blocks.reward: Zeram Powder, 4,500 Mira, 3 AP (+2 if all found)

blocks.name: Father's Pocket Watch
blocks.content:
**Alisa** must be in your party. Speak to 4 NPC groups:
1. **Harves & Gregor** — Entrance of Roer Institute of Technology (2F NW)
2. **Mine Chief Rudolf** — Outside Sachsen Iron Mines
3. **Miner Aman** — Inside Sachsen Iron Mines (Freight Station)
4. **Old Man Gwyn** — Lake Lacrima (by the truck)

Return to Jackass after speaking to all four.

blocks.heading: Shrine Trials Part B: Remaining Bosses
blocks.content:
Clear the remaining three shrine bosses:

**Shrine 2 — Magic Knight Heavy Ruby** (HP 199,127): Buff early. Use Rean's *Arc Slash* and Laura's *Radiant Wings* for setup. Main damage comes from Laura's **Earth Cleaver**. Spam S-Crafts when HP drops to 60-70k.

**Shrine 3 — Magic Knight Isla-Zeriel** (HP 210,210): Identical strategy to Heavy Ruby but with slightly higher stats. Same approach works.

blocks.name: Grianos-Aura
blocks.heading: Shrine 4 Boss: Grianos-Aura

stats.Grianos-Aura: HP 249,843 | Can inflict Freeze and Confuse

blocks.strategy:
**Preparation:** Emma with **Might Set** and Elemental Bell quartz. Rean with **Zeus Gem**. Equip Freeze/Confuse resistant accessories on everyone.

**Strategy:**
1. Overdrive Rean/Emma immediately.
2. Rean: Apply SPD buffs to the party.
3. Emma: Cast **Crescent Shell** and re-apply every turn, especially after boss attacks strip buffs. Use arts and S-Crafts for damage.
4. The boss's attacks can Freeze and Confuse your party—resistance accessories are non-negotiable here.

**Reward:** Zemurian Crystal.

blocks.heading: Post-Shrine: Final Preparations
blocks.content:
After clearing all four shrines, collect all **Zemurian Crystals** and craft **Attack Ex-Orbs** for Valimar. Make a **backup save** at the Courageous. Defeat any remaining **Cryptids** if you missed them earlier.

Speak to **George** at the Hangar and select the red option to advance the story. Note: the party is auto-boosted to **Lv 108** (Sara to Lv 111).

checkpoints.label: Advanced story via George (party boosted to Lv 108)

blocks.heading: December 30: Final Activities
blocks.content:
Play the **Blade** mini-game with a Class VII member (plus Sara) in the Leisure Room for **800 Link EXP**. Speak to **Monica** twice on 4F to update her profile and receive the **Kaiser Burger** recipe.

Visit **Alfin** on 4F for rewards based on your completion:
- If all profiles acquired: Receive **Phoenix Medal of Love**
- If all 3 Phoenix Medals acquired: Receive **Vermillion** Master Quartz
- *2nd Playthrough:* Receive **Deus Gem**

Speak to **Professor Schmitt** at the Hangar for a brief scene.

checkpoints.label: Received Vermillion Master Quartz (all 3 Phoenix Medals)

blocks.heading: The Final Operation: Team Selection
blocks.content:
Speak to **Towa** at the Bridge to begin. Select your teams carefully:

**Team A:** Mandatory **Towa**. Recommended: Alisa, Jusis or Emma.
**Team B:** Mandatory **Angelica**. Recommended: Laura, Fie, Machias.

**Divine Knight Battle:** Select your **Link Partner**. This choice affects the final bonding event trophy—pick the character you want for the ending.

checkpoints.label: Selected Team A and Team B for final operation

blocks.name: Goliath B & Kestrel B
blocks.heading: Mech Battle: Goliath B & Kestrel B

stats.Goliath B: Slower mech, good for building CP

blocks.strategy: Target **Goliath B** first to build CP safely since it's slower. Heal whenever HP drops below 50%. Use **Morning Moon** when you reach 200 CP for a powerful evasive strike. Be careful with Kestrel B—it's the fastest mech and will counter-attack frequently, so save defensive abilities for it.

blocks.name: Team B: Thors Academy Students
blocks.heading: Team B Battle: Thors Academy

stats.Enemies: Vincent, Sariffa, Edel, Friedel | Sariffa heals the team

blocks.strategy:
**Laura:** Use *Brilliant Spin* to gather enemies, then *Brilliant Ember* to Mute Sariffa.
**Fie:** *Bullet Cyclone* for status ailments and AT Delay.
**Angelica:** Focus **Sariffa** first (she's the healer). Use *Zero Impact* for damage.
**Machias:** *Burst Drive* for AoE damage.

Apply status ailments (especially Seal) to lock them down. Use S-Crafts once enemies drop below 50% HP to finish.

blocks.name: Team A: Thors Academy Students
blocks.heading: Team A Battle: Thors Academy

stats.Enemies: Patrick, Celestin, Ferris, Lambert | Celestin heals, Ferris can Impede

blocks.strategy:
**Towa:** Use *A-Detector* to scan all enemies.
**Rean:** *Chrono Burst* first, then *Arc Slash* for AT Delay and art cancellation.
**Alisa:** *Heavenly Gift* for CP recovery and Insight.

Focus **Celestin** first since he heals the party. Cast arts before **Ferris** gets a turn—she can Impede your casting. Use S-Crafts to finish when HP is low.

blocks.heading: Ending Act 2 - Part 4
blocks.content: After both team battles conclude, the AP is tallied. You need **67 total AP** for an **S Rank**. This is cumulative across all of Act 2.

checkpoints.label: Achieved S-Rank (67 AP total for Act 2)
